pr.title: backup: set backup.index.read.enabled cluster setting to public
pr.body:
The `backup.index.read.enabled` cluster setting controls whether the
backup index is read when reading from a backup collection. With backup
index reading now enabled by default in the 26.2 Public Preview, this
setting should be publicly visible so that users can discover and
configure it as needed.

Add `settings.WithPublic` to the setting registration to make it
visible in `SHOW CLUSTER SETTINGS`.

Resolves: #169083
Epic: CRDB-63242

Release note (ops change): The `backup.index.read.enabled` cluster
setting is now public and visible in `SHOW CLUSTER SETTINGS`.

Generated by Claude Code Auto-Solver
